comparison_surface_note: Reads the official Configuration clientbound keep_alive frame from configuration_keepalive_clientbound_framed_dispatch.answer.jsonl, targets the factored keep_alive branch used by stevenarella/src/server/mod.rs Server::spawn_reader, and expects the observed response bytes to match VarInt(official serverbound framed length) plus the official serverbound framed payload from configuration_keepalive_framed_dispatch.answer.jsonl.
test_topology_note: This runtime spawn_reader manifest is intentionally below oracle/test-manifests/775/runtime because the current jar-backed runner only handles direct jar-regenerated cases and manifests.

internal_owner.symbol_or_test_surface: Server::spawn_reader keep_alive branch / Server::handle_next_reader_packet_for_oracle -> Conn::read_packet() -> Packet::map() -> MappedPacket::KeepAliveClientbound(id) -> packet::send_keep_alive(write, id)
internal_owner.scope_note: Reader-loop keep_alive branch target only; not Configuration completion, Play entry, registry hydration, world load, or render readiness.

stop_boundary: This manifest proves or fails the factored spawn_reader keep_alive branch reaction for one official Configuration keep_alive frame; it does not prove Configuration completion, registry hydration, Play entry, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
